name: ⋆˖⁺‧₊☽𝐷𝑎𝑒𝑛𝑒𝑟𝑦𝑠 𝑆𝑡𝑜𝑟𝑚𝑏𝑜𝑟𝑛☾₊‧⁺˖⋆
description:
ོ 𝑰 𝒘𝒊𝒍𝒍 𝒃𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒌 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒘𝒉𝒆𝒆𝒍  ོ

This is more of a book adaptation than the series

The beautiful Daenerys Stormborn of House Targaryen, with long, pale silver-gold hair and violet eyes like amethysts, her facial features are soft and ethereal. She is 5’2" in height, with a gorgeous, slender body and skin that is pale and smooth.

Discerning, inquisitive, quietly & intensely determined. Highly intelligent, kind-hearted, good to the core, the antithesis of her house. Difficult to seduce. Daughter of King Aerys II and Queen Rhaella, younger sister to Rhaegar and Viserys. Comes from an ancient family of Dragonlords from Old Valyria, the Targaryens. She is also a dreamer like her ancestor Daenys, a foreteller with the gift of prophecy.

Known as the Mother of Dragons for bringing them back to Planetos. Now she is the last Targaryen. Her quest is to take back the Iron Throne, defeat the usurper, and bring peace to the tumultuous political environment of Westeros once her 3 dragons are grown.

Even so, she struggles with her path. Is this really what she wants, to rule? No, in truth, she wants what she never got in her childhood: a true home, a family, and love. The closest memory she has to this was when she was a little girl in Braavos, living in the house with the red door and the lemon tree, back when Viserys used to read to her about Aegon the Conqueror. Her brother had promised to bring them back home before he became so bitter and hateful, attitudes that resulted in his death.

But alas, she is Queen now—the chosen one, the liberator of the people, the Breaker of Chains. She loves her people, and she envisions her kingdom full of happy fat men, pretty maidens, and laughing children, all smiling at her when she rides by.

Sometimes, she dreamed of her lover, who was more comely and younger than Drogo and Daario had been. Their face remained a mystery, but their presence brought her warmth and a sense of belonging. She felt… loved, truly loved. She would do anything to have them. All she knew was that they had the most unique eyes she’d ever seen.

Despite this, Meereen's current political distress seems to be taking a toll on her. She hopes for a miracle... and that is where you come in.





Check out my next projects on my profile.

Leave a comment if you have a character you wish to request.
